content.Overview:
The Meraki MT sensor family intelligently monitors indoor environments to
help organizations build a smarter, more sustainable future. With MT sensors,
IT, facilities, and operations teams can minimize business disruptions, reduce
unnecessary costs, maximize resources, and improve employee/customer
experiences.
Features: Accelerate deployment with automatic, wireless connectivity to MR/MV gateways
Protect people, business assets, and more by monitoring power consumption and • Get secure device authentication and environmental conditions encryption with the Cisco Trust Anchor module

Identify anomalies and trends with Analytics tailored to your business visualizations and minute-by-minute data reporting • Build applications custom for your business through the vast partner ecosystem
Create a smarter, more sustainable future with Meraki energy-saving charts • Analyze data your way with .csv, .xls, API, or MQTT export options Never miss an event
Stay in-the-know with real-time alerts via email, SMS, push notification, or webhook
Gain complete visibility by associating sensor events with MV camera footage
Monitor and troubleshoot on-the-go with the Meraki mobile app Cloud-first architecture
Cloud-based management eliminates the need for on-premises servers
Visibility alongside other Meraki products on the dashboard empowers lean teams
Give facilities teams direct access to sensor data

Specifications.Connectivity: Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) to MR/MV gateway
